mapper.sql: pa.id, pa.product_id, p.title AS product_title, pa.account_name_masked, pa.account_ciphertext, pa.secret_ciphertext, pa.note_ciphertext, pa.account_digest, pa.status, pa.resource_type, pa.card_key_ciphertext, pa.card_key_digest, pa.allocation_handle, pa.sale_status, pa.enable_status, pa.used_status, pa.assigned_order_id, o.order_no AS assigned_order_no, pa.assigned_at, pa.created_at, pa.updated_at

id, product_id, account_name_masked, account_ciphertext, secret_ciphertext, note_ciphertext, account_digest, status, resource_type, card_key_ciphertext, card_key_digest, allocation_handle, sale_status, enable_status, used_status, assigned_order_id, assigned_at, created_at, updated_at
mapper.select: SELECT FROM product_account pa LEFT JOIN shop_product p ON p.id = pa.product_id LEFT JOIN shop_order o ON o.id = pa.assigned_order_id WHERE pa.resource_type = 'CARD_KEY' ORDER BY pa.created_at DESC, pa.id DESC

SELECT FROM product_account pa LEFT JOIN shop_product p ON p.id = pa.product_id LEFT JOIN shop_order o ON o.id = pa.assigned_order_id WHERE pa.resource_type = 'CARD_KEY' AND pa.product_id = #{productId} ORDER BY pa.created_at DESC, pa.id DESC
SELECT FROM product_account pa LEFT JOIN shop_product p ON p.id = pa.product_id LEFT JOIN shop_order o ON o.id = pa.assigned_order_id WHERE pa.id = #{id} AND pa.resource_type = 'CARD_KEY' LIMIT 1
SELECT DISTINCT product_id FROM product_account WHERE resource_type = 'CARD_KEY' ORDER BY product_id ASC
SELECT FROM product_account WHERE id = #{id} LIMIT 1
SELECT FROM product_account WHERE product_id = #{productId} AND resource_type = 'CARD_KEY' AND sale_status = 'UNSOLD' AND enable_status = 'ENABLED' ORDER BY id ASC LIMIT #{quantity} FOR UPDATE
SELECT FROM product_account WHERE assigned_order_id = #{orderId} ORDER BY id ASC FOR UPDATE

SELECT FROM product_account WHERE product_id = #{productId} AND resource_type = 'CARD_KEY' AND sale_status = 'UNSOLD' AND enable_status = 'ENABLED' AND allocation_handle IS NOT NULL AND allocation_handle != '' ORDER BY id ASC
SELECT FROM product_account WHERE resource_type = 'CARD_KEY' AND (allocation_handle IS NULL OR allocation_handle = '') ORDER BY id ASC LIMIT #{limit}
mapper.update: UPDATE product_account SET resource_type = 'LEGACY_ACCOUNT', sale_status = CASE WHEN assigned_order_id IS NULL THEN 'UNSOLD' ELSE 'SOLD' END, enable_status = 'DISABLED', used_status = 'UNUSED', status = 'DISABLED' WHERE resource_type IS NULL OR resource_type <> 'CARD_KEY'
UPDATE product_account SET sale_status = 'SOLD', used_status = 'UNUSED', status = 'ASSIGNED', assigned_order_id = #{orderId}, assigned_at = #{assignedAt} WHERE id = #{id}

UPDATE product_account SET sale_status = 'SOLD', used_status = 'UNUSED', status = 'ASSIGNED', assigned_order_id = #{orderId}, assigned_at = #{assignedAt} WHERE id IN
#{id}

UPDATE product_account SET sale_status = 'SOLD', used_status = 'UNUSED', status = 'ASSIGNED', assigned_order_id = #{orderId}, assigned_at = #{assignedAt} WHERE product_id = #{productId} AND resource_type = 'CARD_KEY' AND sale_status = 'UNSOLD' AND enable_status = 'ENABLED' AND assigned_order_id IS NULL AND allocation_handle IN
#{handle}

UPDATE product_account SET sale_status = 'UNSOLD', used_status = 'UNUSED', status = CASE WHEN enable_status = 'ENABLED' THEN 'AVAILABLE' ELSE 'DISABLED' END, assigned_order_id = NULL, assigned_at = NULL WHERE id = #{id}

UPDATE product_account SET sale_status = 'UNSOLD', used_status = 'UNUSED', status = CASE WHEN enable_status = 'ENABLED' THEN 'AVAILABLE' ELSE 'DISABLED' END, assigned_order_id = NULL, assigned_at = NULL WHERE resource_type = 'CARD_KEY' AND assigned_order_id = #{orderId}

UPDATE product_account SET enable_status = #{enableStatus}, status = CASE WHEN sale_status = 'SOLD' THEN 'ASSIGNED' WHEN #{enableStatus} = 'ENABLED' THEN 'AVAILABLE' ELSE 'DISABLED' END WHERE id = #{id}

UPDATE product_account SET enable_status = 'DISABLED', status = CASE WHEN sale_status = 'SOLD' THEN 'ASSIGNED' ELSE 'DISABLED' END WHERE resource_type = 'CARD_KEY' AND product_id = #{productId} AND enable_status <> 'DISABLED'
UPDATE product_account SET enable_status = 'DISABLED', status = CASE WHEN sale_status = 'SOLD' THEN 'ASSIGNED' ELSE 'DISABLED' END WHERE resource_type = 'CARD_KEY' AND enable_status <> 'DISABLED'

UPDATE product_account SET enable_status = 'ENABLED', status = CASE WHEN sale_status = 'SOLD' THEN 'ASSIGNED' ELSE 'AVAILABLE' END WHERE resource_type = 'CARD_KEY' AND product_id = #{productId} AND enable_status <> 'ENABLED'
UPDATE product_account SET enable_status = 'ENABLED', status = CASE WHEN sale_status = 'SOLD' THEN 'ASSIGNED' ELSE 'AVAILABLE' END WHERE resource_type = 'CARD_KEY' AND enable_status <> 'ENABLED'
